instructions.text: Listen to instructions - choose what you'd write in notes
instructions.audio: Which words would you write down?

scenarios.audio: Meet me at the library at 3pm tomorrow
scenarios.instruction: Meet me at the library at 3pm tomorrow
scenarios.explanation: Location, time, and when = the key facts

scenarios.audio: To bake cookies preheat oven to 350 degrees
scenarios.instruction: To bake cookies preheat oven to 350 degrees

scenarios.audio: Abraham Lincoln was the 16th president during the Civil War
scenarios.instruction: Abraham Lincoln was 16th president during Civil War
scenarios.explanation: Name, number, and event = key facts

tryAgain.message: Focus on: who, what, when, numbers
